full_text:
Wu Wu 吳五
ARomance of the Three KingdomsEncyclopedia officer profile.
Wu Wu (吳五)was born in Kuaiji. Local leader on the upper Min River between Jian’an and Houguan counties. Destroyed by He Qi.
